creator: andrey@bsdnir.info
text:
v7.8.2, released 2023-03-17

    Mattermost v7.8.2 contains a high severity level security fix. Upgrading to this release is recommended. Details will be posted on our security updates page 30 days after release

https://docs.mattermost.com/install/self-managed-changelog.html#release-v7-8-extended-support-release
